title: Fix Filter Dropdown Toggling When Switching Views on Object Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want filter dropdowns to only appear when I explicitly click the filter button so that switching between dictionary and migration views doesn't unexpectedly toggle filters.
description: When switching between the dictionary and migration views on object.php, the migrate/report filter dropdown was unexpectedly appearing. The filter dropdown should only be visible when the user explicitly clicks the filter button.
acceptance_criteria: Switching between dictionary and migration views does not toggle filter dropdowns
Filter dropdowns only appear when the filter button is clicked
No regressions in filter behavior within each view
ux_changes: Filter dropdown no longer auto-toggles when switching between dictionary and migration views.
implementation_notes: Developer also found and fixed a related display issue that was not mentioned in the ticket.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the filter toggle issue and also addressed an additional related display bug.
